raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The output names one prior work (Long et al., 2023) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical differences.",
    "R1.7": "The output flags one missing citation by noting that it has not verified the cited authors, years, or accuracy figures. It does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The output flags uncertainty for one claim (the framing claim 'first multi-agent LLM framework' was left as written) but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, with no drift from the requested dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free and identifies no harmful patterns in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced (e.g., changes to sentence structure and phrasing), but minor edits (e.g., punctuation or word choice) are not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The output names one prior work (Long et al., 2023) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical differences.
rationale.R1.7: The output flags one missing citation by noting that it has not verified the cited authors, years, or accuracy figures. It does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one claim (the framing claim 'first multi-agent LLM framework' was left as written) but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, with no drift from the requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies no harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced (e.g., changes to sentence structure and phrasing), but minor edits (e.g., punctuation or word choice) are not annotated with source and reason.
